principle: Workflow orchestration is the runtime control flow, not the agent architecture topology.

patterns.name: Linear Sequence
patterns.use_when: Ordered stages with no meaningful branch or rerun.

patterns.name: Gated Pipeline
patterns.use_when: A stage cannot advance until an independent gate passes.

patterns.name: Work-Order Loop
patterns.use_when: Review or user feedback may trigger bounded reruns.

patterns.name: Conditional Route
patterns.use_when: Different input classes need different stage paths.

patterns.name: Fan-out / Fan-in
patterns.use_when: Independent items or perspectives can run in parallel and then merge.

patterns.name: Human Wait / Resume
patterns.use_when: A human decision or missing input must pause the workflow safely.

patterns.name: Dependency-Aware Rerun
patterns.use_when: Changed artifacts should invalidate and recompute only affected downstream work.
